{{Infobox group
| name = Spider of the Abidan
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Spider of the Abidan]] works to find chaos and disruption among the [[Iterations]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Spider]] is [[Telariel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Spider]] would sense if [[Ozriel]] circumvented restrictions, concealed the manacles, or removed them.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
